payload.actions_taken: ["updated audit to ignore retired story verification drift","registered local validation providers","added propose suppression for resolved provider friction","refreshed US-066 and US-067 verification records","implemented US-072 verification guard","added replayable changeset","validated live and rebuilt audit state"]
payload.decisions_made: ["Treat retired stories as historical records outside active unverified-story audit","register repo-local validation providers through the existing tool registry instead of adding schema","skip historical validation-provider friction once current providers are present","carry replay-only story.verify rows so rebuilt audit state matches live audit state"]
